metadata.notes: minimal program, fx block, ret in Void main
Int arithmetic, variadic println (never '+' for mixed types)
const declaration, plain let mutability (never `let mut`)
@pure helper, canonical multi-branch via sequential if + ret
inline conditional expression (RHS only), bound before printing
condition loop, fx inside loop body
loop i in 0..n (half-open), accumulator pattern
loop { } with break, guard via plain if (no else needed)
@pre and @post directly above the function, @post uses result
Method-local binding shadows a field name; bare local and explicit self.field are both exercised.
Shows that methods receive caller context explicitly instead of capturing outer loop locals.
Minimal canonical ToonDoc -> toon_root -> ToonNode extraction path.
Object-root named-array extraction plus guarded intermediate lookup before a final _or helper.
Queries builtin_info and inspects the returned TOON object for builtin metadata.
Exact-output decimal formatting with explicit Real arithmetic and width:precision formatting.
Exact-output labels plus explicit final return path in a non-Void helper with contracts.
Uses a provided module and calls exported names exactly, without guessed wrappers.
Direct Bool printing with string_len and text equality, shaped to the benchmark validation task.
Inline if-expression on the RHS only, with exact integer output labels.
compute pure values outside fx, perform effects inside fx
Benchmark-mirror TOON file summary with object-root named-array extraction, per-row output, and final totals.
Benchmark-mirror module plus TOON file rollup using exported names exactly and a provided default score.
Weather station telemetry report: object-root TOON extraction, threshold classify, custom totals type, clamped real average. Authored 2026-06-13; verified with build/bin/aether.
Library loan audit: pure overdue/fee helpers, const policy, custom catalog type reusing a field name as a method local. Authored 2026-06-13; verified with build/bin/aether.
Gradebook rollup: clamp + tiered classify, custom gradebook type, clamped real average with fixed precision. Authored 2026-06-13; verified with build/bin/aether.
Incident severity digest: guarded nested-object extraction (toon_has_key before toon_key), coded/missing tally. Authored 2026-06-13; verified with build/bin/aether.
Payroll summary: imports 117_payroll_rates and calls its exact exported const and pure fns; object-root TOON, running totals. Authored 2026-06-13; verified with build/bin/aether.
Fleet maintenance report: object-root TOON, derived km-since-service metric, threshold classify, custom totals type. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Tournament standings: normalize-with-clamp, tiered classify, custom totals type, clamped real average. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@cost with a time unit, placed directly above the function
Warehouse inventory rollup: reorder-threshold classify, running quantity total, custom totals type. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Inline toon_parse of a string literal, object-root array extraction, threshold classify. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Geometry real report: Real const, forced Real operand, fixed-precision value:0:2 output, percentage share. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Sales quota report: imports 124_sales_targets and calls its exact exported consts + pure fn; object-root TOON, bonus tally. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Contract normalize: @pre/@post contracts (@post references result) on a clamp helper, pure banding helper, totals. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Point grid methods: literal Point{x,y} init, new Point() with field assignment, top-level extension method via value.method(). Verified with build/bin/aether.
Username validation: inline toon_parse, string_len length checks, Bool printing, valid counter. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Ticket queue summary: object-root TOON, score-derived status, custom totals type, => formatted rows. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Depot stock report: imports 130_stock_rules and calls its exact exported fn + const; object-root TOON, ok-bin counter. Verified with build/bin/aether.
tuple return from a top-level helper, destructured directly (never bind a tuple-return call to a single name)

Deployment readiness validator: deeply nested TOON (service/resources/rollout), many pure field validators, per-issue ISSUE lines, cross-field check, readiness verdict. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Grant application audit: const cap, cross-field decision, derived award amount, custom audit type with multiple counters and running total. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Sprint board report: clamp-normalize, lane classify, blocked flag, custom board type reusing a field name as a method local, clamped real average. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Contract @pre/@post placed above the function; scalar clamp. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Contract @pre/@post above the function; @post references result; fee floor. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Nested range loops with cross-dimension accumulation and per-cell output. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Nested loops over an array with an i<j guard for round-robin pairings. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Tuple-returning helper with @post on a positional slot; direct-call destructure. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Tuple return of quotient/remainder; direct-call destructure. Verified with build/bin/aether.
top-level fn with self: Type is an extension method, called with method syntax
Boolean operators && || ! in a pure access predicate. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Boolean operators && and ! in a pure refund predicate. Verified with build/bin/aether.
Imports 143_tax_rates and uses its exact exported consts in arithmetic. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pre/@post above fn; speed clamp. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pre/@post above fn; wage floor with @post. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@post above fn; discount cap. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pre/@post above fn; scale then clamp. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@post result>=0 above fn; balance settle. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pure helper; integer F conversion. Verified with build/bin/aether.
iterative computation inside a pure function
@pure tiered letter-grade classifier. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pure sign helper. Verified with build/bin/aether.
tuple return with @post on a slot, above fn. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pure clamp 0..100. Verified with build/bin/aether.
@pre/@post helper applied over an array in a loop. Verified with build/bin/aether.
both @pure and @pre/@post functions in one program. Verified with build/bin/aether.
type block, semicolon fields, lowercase self, method call
canonical brace initialization, Void method with bare ret
Bool method, binding method result, inline conditional label
business-rule guards without else, @pre/@post contracts
new Type() default initialization (Int 0, Text empty)
string_len, '+' only for Text-with-Text concatenation
Recursive @pure helper; complements the iterative factorial coverage in 14_factorial_loop.
'+' for pure-Text building, commas for mixed-type println
dynamic array declaration, xs = xs + [v] append, length(xs)
filtered append, Bool state flipped with an inline conditional
100.0 forces real-valued division, value:0:2 stable output
guarded division with an inline conditional expression
default Real format (6 decimals) vs value:width:precision
parse, object-root field extraction, _or fallback, toon_close
JSON starting with '[' means root IS the array to iterate

capability probing; report availability without invoking the underlying helpers. Output is build-linkage dependent: has_toon() = hasextbuiltin(yyjson,YyjsonRead) and has_ai() = hasextbuiltin(openai,OpenAIChatCompletions). Expected output is for the canonical repo build/bin/aether (yyjson + openai ext-builtins linked); a build without OpenAI prints 'ai: missing' instead.
